final_text:
This confirms the fix: `ModelChoiceField.to_python` raises `ValidationError` without passing `params={'value': value}`.

{"file":"django/forms/models.py","class":"ModelChoiceField","method":"to_python","parent_class":"ChoiceField","fix_summary":"The `to_python` method must pass a `params` dict containing the submitted `value` (e.g., `params={'value': value}`) when raising `ValidationError` for `invalid_choice`, so the `%(value)s` placeholder in the error message is properly substituted."}

parsed_answer.fix_summary: The `to_python` method must pass a `params` dict containing the submitted `value` (e.g., `params={'value': value}`) when raising `ValidationError` for `invalid_choice`, so the `%(value)s` placeholder in the error message is properly substituted.
